passives.name: Lucky Roll
passives.description: After rolling all dice, reroll the single lowest result and keep the new value.

skills.name: Poisoned Dagger
skills.description: Deal dice + DEX damage to a single enemy and apply Poison.

skills.name: Knockout
skills.description: Deal dice + DEX damage to a single enemy and apply Vulnerable.

skills.name: Eviscerate
skills.description: Strike a single enemy multiple times. Hit count equals sum of 2 dice. Each hit deals 2 + DEX damage (4 + DEX if target has any debuff).
